summary: Add `partial` and `errors` fields to the `production compare` summary so agents can distinguish a clean comparison from one where a database returned an error (e.g. NSRDB rejected outside the Americas).
reason: PVGIS v5_3 returns HTTP 400 for `raddatabase=PVGIS-NSRDB` outside the Americas. The original `summary.databases_ok` field was true whenever ≥1 database succeeded, which hid the partial-failure state. The polish skill split the boolean into `databases_ok` (false on any error) plus explicit `partial`/`errors` lists.
